assertions.name: cross_module_scope
assertions.expected: Scope should mention 'tasks' or 'cross' to indicate multi-module change
assertions.actual: No scope in commit message (just 'feat:' without parentheses)

assertions.name: has_body
assertions.description: Complex changes should have body explaining modules affected
assertions.expected: Body should list changes per module (API, backend, mobile)
assertions.actual: Body has only 1 sentence, does not detail which modules were affected (API contract, backend models, mobile models/UI)
